textPlain: > Allow only GET requests i.e. make the internet read-onlyIf only developers never made use of GET to modify resources...https://www.reddit.com/r/webdev/comments/6999x7/comment/dh4v...

This describes httpjail, a new Rust sandbox proxy tool: https://github.com/coder/httpjailIt works for any process, not just Claude Code. I got it working with Codex CLI like this:  httpjail --js "r.host === 'chatgpt.com'" -- codex

After installing it using Cargo (and Homebrew):  brew upgrade rust
  cargo install httpjail

I wrote more notes about it here: https://simonwillison.net/2025/Sep/19/httpjail/
We'll merge that comment hither. Thanks!
